measures.name: F00100_acb_rmp_new
measures.expression: SUMX (     SUMMARIZE (         'D00001_main_calendar',         'D00001_main_calendar'[year_month],         "MonthStart",             DATE (                 YEAR ( MAX ( 'D00001_main_calendar'[calendar_date] ) ),                 MONTH ( MAX ( 'D00001_main_calendar'[calendar_date] ) ),                 1             ),         "MonthEnd",             EOMONTH (                 DATE (                     YEAR ( MAX ( 'D00001_main_calendar'[calendar_date] ) ),                     MONTH ( MAX ( 'D00001_main_calendar'[calendar_date] ) ),                     1                 ),                 0             )     ),      VAR MonthStart = [MonthStart]     VAR MonthEnd   = [MonthEnd]      VAR PrevStart =         EDATE ( MonthStart, -6 )      VAR PrevEnd =         MonthStart - 1      VAR CurrentMonthSales =         CALCULATETABLE (             VALUES ( F00100_sales_sec[salesplace_id] ),             F00100_sales_sec[fact_sale_kg_] > 0,             DATESBETWEEN (                 'D00001_main_calendar'[calendar_date],                 MonthStart,                 MonthEnd             )         )      VAR Prev6MonthSales =         CALCULATETABLE (             VALUES ( F00100_sales_sec[salesplace_id] ),             F00100_sales_sec[fact_sale_kg_] > 0,             DATESBETWEEN (                 'D00001_main_calendar'[calendar_date],                 PrevStart,                 PrevEnd             )         )      RETURN         COUNTROWS (             EXCEPT ( CurrentMonthSales, Prev6MonthSales )         )  )

measures.name: F00100_Avg_SKU_per_RMP
measures.expression: AVERAGEX (     VALUES ( 'D00001_main_calendar'[year_month] ),      VAR AvgPerRMP =         AVERAGEX (             VALUES ( D00700_salesplace[salesplace_parent_code] ),              VAR SKU_cnt =                 CALCULATE (                     DISTINCTCOUNT ( F00100_sales_sec[nomenclature_id] ),                     F00100_sales_sec[fact_sale_qty_] > 0                 )              VAR SalesQty =                 CALCULATE (                     SUM ( F00100_sales_sec[fact_sale_qty_] )                 )              RETURN                 IF ( SalesQty > 0 && SKU_cnt > 0, SKU_cnt )         )      RETURN         AvgPerRMP )

measures.name: F00100_acb_rmp_new
measures.expression: SUMX (     SUMMARIZE (         'D00001_main_calendar',         'D00001_main_calendar'[year_month],         "MonthStart",             DATE (                 YEAR ( MAX ( 'D00001_main_calendar'[calendar_date] ) ),                 MONTH ( MAX ( 'D00001_main_calendar'[calendar_date] ) ),                 1             ),         "MonthEnd",             EOMONTH (                 DATE (                     YEAR ( MAX ( 'D00001_main_calendar'[calendar_date] ) ),                     MONTH ( MAX ( 'D00001_main_calendar'[calendar_date] ) ),                     1                 ),                 0             )     ),      VAR MonthStart = [MonthStart]     VAR MonthEnd   = [MonthEnd]      VAR PrevStart =         EDATE ( MonthStart, -6 )      VAR PrevEnd =         MonthStart - 1      VAR CurrentMonthSales =         CALCULATETABLE (             VALUES ( F00100_sales_sec[salesplace_id] ),             F00100_sales_sec[fact_sale_kg_] > 0,             DATESBETWEEN (                 'D00001_main_calendar'[calendar_date],                 MonthStart,                 MonthEnd             )         )      VAR Prev6MonthSales =         CALCULATETABLE (             VALUES ( F00100_sales_sec[salesplace_id] ),             F00100_sales_sec[fact_sale_kg_] > 0,             DATESBETWEEN (                 'D00001_main_calendar'[calendar_date],                 PrevStart,                 PrevEnd             )         )      RETURN         COUNTROWS (             EXCEPT ( CurrentMonthSales, Prev6MonthSales )         )  )

measures.name: f00100_freq_sales_fact
